description: Beautiful 2+1 condo in the heart of Vaughan. Currently tenanted at $2,700/month. Tenant would like to stay. Condo fee includes water and building insurance. One underground parking spot included.
notes: Calibration case — tenant in place + parking

description: Stunning detached home in North York. No pets please. Utilities extra. Newly renovated kitchen and bathrooms. Quick closing preferred.
notes: Multi-flag case

description: Sold as-is. Handyman special in need of TLC. Great bones. Investor opportunity. Short-term rental permitted in building.
notes: Fixer-upper + STR flag

description: Bright 2-bedroom condo on the 18th floor. Monthly condo fee is $612 and covers heat, water, and building maintenance. Parking included. Locker included. Steps to subway.
notes: Standard condo with explicit condo fee — parking included via direct statement

description: Spacious corner unit. Well-maintained building with reasonable maintenance of $580 per month covering common elements. Pet friendly building — dogs and cats welcome. Tenant pays own hydro extra.
notes: Condo fee buried in paragraph — pets allowed + utilities extra

description: Rare fully detached 3-bedroom in east Hamilton. No condo fees ever. Large lot, double car garage. Owner-occupied, vacant possession on closing. Great starter or investment.
notes: Freehold with no condo fee — all flags should be absent

description: Modern stacked townhouse. Condo fee TBD — builder finalizing budget. Occupancy expected Q3. Pets not permitted per building rules. Brand new floors and kitchen.
notes: Condo fee TBD — no_pets fires + brand new floors triggers recently_renovated

description: All utilities included — heat, hydro, water, and cable. Perfect for a tenant seeking hassle-free living. Pet free building. Steps from GO station.
notes: Utilities included via standard phrase + pet free building

description: Investors take note: this property has an active Airbnb history with over 200 five-star reviews. Existing tenant in place — flexible closing.
notes: STR history (Airbnb) + tenant in place

description: No pets allowed in this building. Underground parking included with unit. Heat and hydro included in monthly rent. Ensuite laundry. Well-maintained.
notes: Multiple flags: no pets, parking, utilities included

description: Parking available for separate purchase at $35,000. Locker extra. Pet friendly — cats and small dogs welcome. Utilities extra — tenant is responsible for hydro and heat extra.
notes: Parking for purchase (NOT included) — pets allowed, utilities extra

description: Price recently reduced from $749,000 to $719,000 — motivated seller. Estate sale, sold as-is. Probate is clear. Great opportunity for renovators.
notes: Estate sale + sold as-is triggers needs_work; price reduction is not a regex flag
Empty description — no flags should fire

description: Beau 3 chambres et demi dans le Plateau-Mont-Royal. Chauffage inclus. Disponible immédiatement. Animal de compagnie bienvenu.
notes: French description — English regex patterns should not fire on French text

description: Fully gut renovated in 2023 — new plumbing, electrical, and HVAC. Brand new kitchen with quartz countertops. Recently updated bathrooms. Move-in ready.
notes: Major renovation — recently_renovated fires; not a fixer-upper

description: Secondary suite in basement of detached home. Separate entrance. In-law suite perfectly set up for extended family or rental income. Currently rented at market rate.
notes: In-law suite / secondary suite + currently rented

description: Approx 900 sq ft as per builder floor plan. Tenant is currently month-to-month. Heat extra. Pets welcome with landlord approval.
notes: Vague sq ft — tenanted + utilities extra + pets allowed

description: Spacious unit in a well-maintained mid-rise. Amenities include gym, concierge, rooftop terrace, and indoor pool. One parking spot included. Pet free building.
notes: Gym/concierge/pool listed — parking included + pet free

description: Investment property with existing tenant in place at $2,400/month. Tenant pays utilities extra. No pets per lease. VRBO rental history from previous owner — short-term rentals now prohibited by building.
notes: Multiple flags — VRBO mention fires str_history even though STR is now prohibited; this is a known regex limitation

description: Tenant in place paying $3,200/month. Sold as-is. No pets. Utilities extra — tenant pays all utilities. 1 parking included. Basement unit with separate entrance. Newly renovated kitchen.
notes: All-flags baseline — every current flag fires in a single description
